name: trading-system
$comment: builtin-baseline freezes the entire transitive dependency graph to one vcpkg registry commit, so nothing updates unless this hash changes. The overrides below additionally hard-pin every direct dependency to its exact installed version, immune even to a baseline bump.

overrides.$reason: protobuf >= v22 bundles upb, whose vsnprintf_compat.h calls the MSVC-only _vsnprintf_s and fails to link with MinGW. 3.21.12 is the last pre-abseil/pre-upb release.
overrides.name: protobuf
